title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Medlife Advisory Limited family as a Senior Software Engineer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
